---
title: "Forest plots & funnel plots"
---

Generated by `R/04_meta_analysis.R` and `R/07_publication_bias.R`. When the
pipeline runs against the synthetic seed dataset every figure is watermarked.

## Depression

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Forest plot — depression](figures/forest_depression.png)

![Funnel plot — depression](figures/funnel_depression.png)
:::

## Anxiety

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Forest plot — anxiety](figures/forest_anxiety.png)

![Funnel plot — anxiety](figures/funnel_anxiety.png)
:::

## Suicidality / self-harm

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Forest plot — suicidality](figures/forest_suicidality.png)

![Funnel plot — suicidality](figures/funnel_suicidality.png)
:::
